overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City Definitive Edition showing the player character exploring a neon-lit art deco city street at night. The character walks past hotels and along a palm tree-lined promenade, with the camera briefly tilting up to view the starry sky before continuing toward a traffic intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: art deco hotel district with neon signage

events.description: character turns and begins walking along the street past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit street, turning to look at the surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with teal facade and cyan neon trim
yellow building with orange neon vertical accent lighting
hotel building with large vertical white neon sign

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing near teal and yellow art deco buildings illuminated by vibrant neon lights. The character turns and walks along the sidewalk, passing the Ocean View Hotel with its prominent vertical signage. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposing direction along the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside promenade with palm trees and grass lawn

events.description: moves from enclosed street to open palm-lined promenade with grass area
camera tilts upward to view the night sky and stars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the palm tree-lined path next to the grassy area

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees along the edge of the grass lawn
grassy area between the sidewalk and the beach
tall modern glass building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open beachside promenade with palm trees lining a grassy area on the right. The character walks along the concrete path with the distant skyscraper visible ahead. Midway through the segment, the camera tilts upward to reveal the clear night sky with stars before returning to the forward view.

events.description: approaching traffic light intersection with vehicles waiting
pedestrian passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching the traffic light

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
passing by closely on the right side of the frame

entered.detail: horizontal traffic light fixture extending over the intersection
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the palm tree-lined sidewalk, gradually approaching a traffic light intersection. The distant skyscraper grows larger in the frame as the camera moves forward. Other pedestrians appear walking in both directions, and one passes closely by on the right. Vehicles move along the multi-lane road to the left as the character nears the traffic signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban street toward an open beachside promenade and a distant city intersection. It begins with the character walking past teal and yellow art deco buildings, passing the prominent vertical signage of the Ocean View Hotel as sparse pedestrians move along the multi-lane street. As the character advances, the scene opens into a beachside promenade where palm trees line a grassy area and the camera briefly tilts upward to reveal a clear, starry night sky. The view then returns forward, following the character along the concrete path as a distant skyscraper grows larger in the frame. Finally, the movement leads toward a traffic light intersection, passing closer pedestrians and flowing vehicle traffic on the left.
